closureCriteria.criterion: local, regtest, signet, supplementary testnet, and mainnet-ready environment lanes are specified
evidence: packages/btd/src/deployment-lanes.ts defines local, regtest, signet, testnet, mainnet-ready, and mainnet-value-bearing lanes
buildV27CryptoDeploymentLane enforces signet/regtest/mainnet network pairing and operational approval for value-bearing mainnet
buildV27CryptoDeploymentReadinessReceipt records required environment keys and blocks missing readiness

closureCriteria.criterion: signet is the canonical public Bitcoin proof lane and public testnet is supplementary
evidence: package constants and deployment lanes mark signet as the proof lane for public Bitcoin readiness
package and demonstration tests exercise signet readiness
testnet remains a lane without being the canonical proof lane

closureCriteria.criterion: telemetry covers wallet, fee, broadcast, confirmation, reorg, RPC disagreement, projection lag, access, settlement, and upgrade failures
evidence: packages/btd/src/telemetry.ts defines the V27 crypto telemetry event taxonomy and severity classifier
buildV27CryptoTelemetryRecord emits classified telemetry records with subject, receipt root, ledger anchor, and issued time
/api/btd/deployment-readiness persists telemetry records through btd_crypto_telemetry_events only when commitToRegistry is true

closureCriteria.criterion: value-bearing mainnet launch remains gated by operational approval while mainnet-ready configuration is supported
evidence: mainnet-ready lanes require mainnet network but remain valueBearing: false
package and demonstration tests reject value-bearing mainnet readiness without operational approval

closureCriteria.criterion: ledgerized upgrades and migrations emit versioned receipts
evidence: packages/btd/src/upgrade.ts defines planned, applied, verified, rolled-back, and failed upgrade receipts
/api/btd/deployment-readiness plans and transitions upgrade receipts and optionally persists btd_protocol_upgrade_receipts
package/API/demo tests prove planned upgrade receipts and invalid post-verification transition rejection

validatedCommands.notes: Jest reports pre-existing duplicate manual mock warnings outside the V27 package/API slice.
Jest reports pre-existing duplicate manual mock warnings outside the V27 ORM slice.

nonPromotionAssertions: BITCODE_SPEC.txt remained V26 until Gate 16 promotion
BITCODE_SPEC_V27_PROVEN.md did not exist until Gate 16 promotion
Gate 15 closure does not itself approve value-bearing mainnet launch, generated V27 proof-family closure, or V27 promotion
All BTD API route paths remain unversioned
